description_en: Investissement Québec is the Quebec government's economic development agency. It offers loans, loan guarantees, and equity investments to support business creation, expansion, and innovation in Quebec.
description_fr: Investissement Québec est l'agence de développement économique du gouvernement du Québec. Elle offre des prêts, des garanties de prêt et des prises de participation.

products.description_en: Subordinated loans and loan guarantees for early-stage businesses
products.note_en: IQ often takes a subordinated position to allow traditional bank financing to proceed

products.description_en: Support for R&D projects and technology commercialisation
Financing to support Quebec businesses expanding into international markets

contact.montreal_office: 1200 avenue McGill College, Bureau 1500, Montréal, QC H3B 4G7
